2040.7 keV gamma-ray production cross section upper
The definition of upper limits was made for broader
energy intervals, selected to correspond to existing
The production cross section of the 2040.7-keV gamma
ray was determined from all three gamma distributions
independently according to the branching ratios.
For each energy interval the most restrictive value of
uncertainty of SIGgamma, was taken as the upper limit
DATA-MAX, corresponding to a confidence level of 99.7%.
